div1.entryFree: Broker, agent, negotiator: they say 'a crafty knave does need no b.,' H6B I, 2, 100. Especially a procurer, a go-between: vows were ever --s to defiling, Compl. 173. a goodly b. Gentl. I, 2, 41. (commodity) that sly devil, that b. John II, 568. this bawd, this b. John II, 568 to play the b. H6C IV, 1, 63. hence, b., lackey, Troil. V, 10, 33 (some M. Edd. broker-lackey). his vows are --s, Hml. I, 3, 127.
